title: Woman Receives 12-Year Sentence for 1978 Scalding Death of Stepdaughter, 5
summary_full: Janice Nix was found guilty of manslaughter after her stepson told the police that she had forced his sister into a hot bath as a form of punishment in their home in South London.
summary_public: Janice Nix was found guilty of manslaughter after her stepson told the police that she had forced his sister into a hot bath as a form of punishment in their home in South London.
